objective: Objectif: Sur le token SYNUSDC dans le timeframe 3m, lancer une stratégie composée d'indicateurs multiples tels que EMA, STOCHASTIC et RSI avec conditions de filtration additionnelles (mode_consensus ou mode_inverse), un stop loss adapté à la volatilité sur les prix, ainsi qu'un take profit basé sur le pivot point. Indicateurs : EMA + STOCHASTIC + RSI + ATR. Entrées : filtre horaire de liquidité + confirmation partielle mode_consensus / filtre anti-faux-signais + conflit majoritaires mode_inverse. Sorties : vwap pivot point take profit SL/TP. Diversification: Pour éviter les formulations génériques, incluez des approches non standard comme le filtre horaire de liquidité et le filtrage anti-faux-signais. Même si cela requiert un peu plus d'effort, il est essentiel pour la créativité du design stratégique. Propose une hypothèse testable et falsifiable: Cette stratégie doit être conçue de manière à être examinée clairement sous un certain nombre d'angles, permettant ainsi l

iterations.hypothesis: This strategy uses RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR indicators together to exploit market trends while incorporating risk management through ATR based stop loss and take profit. This combination reduces the occurrence of false signals in ranging markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses three indicators RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR to exploit market trends while incorporating risk management through ATR based stop loss. The use of multiple filters can increase the complexity but also reduce the occurrence of false signals in ranging markets. However, it's important to consider potential weaknesses such as overfitting or high correlation among filters leading to poor performance. In case of negative return, I would focus on improving risk management by reducing stop loss and take profit levels or adjusting entry criteria. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), a parameter adjustment could be tweaking the thresholds for each filter.
[Backup plan] 1) Analyze potential weaknesses such as overfitting or high correlation among filters leading to poor performance. 2) Adjust risk management by reducing stop loss and take profit levels or adjusting entry criteria if returns are negative. 3) Tweak threshold values for each filter if results remain mediocre but positive.
